children.label: A
children.text: minimize potential loan forfeitures;

children.label: B
children.text: minimize the accumulation of stocks of the commodity by the Federal Government;

children.label: C
children.text: minimize the cost incurred by the Federal Government in storing the commodity;

children.label: D
children.text: allow the commodity produced in the United States to be marketed freely and competitively, both domestically and internationally; and

children.label: E
children.text: minimize discrepancies in marketing loan benefits across State boundaries and across county boundaries.

children.heading: Repayment rates for upland cotton and rice
children.label: b Repayment rates for upland cotton and rice

children.text: the loan rate established for the commodity under , plus interest (determined in accordance with ); orsection 7932 of this titlesection 7283 of this title

children.heading: Repayment rates for extra long staple cotton
children.label: c Repayment rates for extra long staple cotton
children.text: Repayment of a marketing assistance loan for extra long staple cotton shall be at the loan rate established for the commodity under , plus interest (determined in accordance with ).section 7932 of this titlesection 7283 of this title
a formula to determine the prevailing world market price for upland cotton and rice, adjusted to United States quality and location; and
a mechanism by which the Secretary shall announce periodically the prevailing world market price for upland cotton and rice.

children.heading: Repayment rates for confectionery and other kinds of sunflower seeds
children.label: f Repayment rates for confectionery and other kinds of sunflower seeds

children.text: the loan rate established for the commodity under , plus interest (determined in accordance with ); orsection 7932 of this titlesection 7283 of this title

children.heading: Quality grades for dry peas, lentils, and small chickpeas
children.label: g Quality grades for dry peas, lentils, and small chickpeas
children.text: The loan repayment rate for dry peas, lentils, and small chickpeas shall be based on the quality grades for the applicable commodity specified in .section 7932(d) of this title

children.heading: Good faith exception to beneficial interest requirement
children.label: h Good faith exception to beneficial interest requirement
children.text: For the 2001 crop year only, in the case of the producers on a farm that marketed or otherwise lost beneficial interest in a loan commodity for which a marketing assistance loan was made under before repaying the loan, the Secretary shall permit the producers to repay the loan at the appropriate repayment rate that was in effect for the loan commodity under on the date that the producers lost beneficial interest, as determined by the Secretary, if the Secretary determines the producers acted in good faith.section 7231 of this titlesection 7234 of this title
